name: xblocker
description: Advanced X.com content filtering and user management extension
author: daymade <daymadev89@gmail.com>

scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json tsconfig.json wxt.config.ts bts.jsonc .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json bunfig.toml README.md "entrypoints/**/*.ts" "test/**/*.ts" "packages/**/*.ts"
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json wxt.config.ts bts.jsonc .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json bunfig.toml README.md "entrypoints/**/*.ts" "test/**/*.ts" "packages/**/*.ts"
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run lint:boundaries && bun run format:check && bun test && bun run build
